//: Lab-net (lolwtf.ca, VLAN 2) single source of truth: the network CIDR and full host IPs for consumers that can't do CIDR math on clients.yaml's DHCP-reservation octets. Terraform auto-loads this file as local.lab (a precondition on unifi_network.lab in lolwtf.ca.tf keeps it in sync with clients.yaml); the spore/rackpi5 Nix configs read the same file with builtins.fromJSON via .locals.lab.
